Grand Carousel.description: One of the largest carousels in the world. Built in 1913, it features a working brass ring grabber and a classic band organ.

Haunted Mansion.description: Take a classic dark ride through a haunted estate, featuring traditional physical stunts, ghosts, and jump scares.

Impulse.description: A thrilling steel coaster featuring a 90-degree vertical lift hill, a 98-degree beyond-vertical drop, and four inversions.

Phoenix.description: A legendary, award-winning wooden roller coaster relocated from Texas in 1985. Famously offers unmatched double-down airtime.

Power Surge.description: Spin, pivot, and flip upside-down in all directions on this high-thrill, rotating pendulum arm flat ride.

Twister.description: A massive, fast-paced wooden coaster wrapping around the park. Features a double-helix around Knoebels' slide tower.

Balloon Race.description: Climb into a hot-air balloon basket that spins and tilts, lifting riders in gentle circles above the park.

Fandango.description: Sit facing outward and swing back and forth like a giant pendulum while the circular ring of seats spins.

Flyer.description: Pilot your own flying tub, using the front rudder sail to catch the wind and swing wildly outward as the ride rotates.

Galleon.description: A classic pirate ship attraction that swings back and forth in high-altitude arcs over the midway.

Giant Wheel.description: A massive 110-foot-tall Ferris wheel offering breathtaking panoramic views of the entire park and the surrounding forest.

Looper.description: A unique vintage ride where riders control the brakes of their cabin, causing it to flip completely upside-down as it spins.

Merry Mixer.description: A classic Scrambler-style flat ride that spins riders in overlapping, intersecting circles for a fast-paced experience.

Paratrooper.description: Spin in suspended umbrellas that tilt at an angle, lifting riders up and out on a classic family swing ride.

Satellite.description: A restored vintage Eyerly Roll-O-Plane that spins and flips riders head-over-heels inside capsule-shaped vehicles.

StratosFear.description: Towering 148 feet in the air, this high-thrill drop tower plunges riders straight down at speeds exceeding 47 mph.

Tilt-A-Whirl.description: Spin, tilt, and slide around on this classic carnival flat ride that sends riders in unpredictable, dizzying circles.

Tornado.description: A spinning swing ride where you can manually spin your individual gondola while the entire ride lifts and tilts in the air.

Crazy Sub.description: Board a spinning submarine in Knoebels' kiddie land. Rises and loops in gentle vertical circles.

Flying Tigers.description: Fly in low-altitude tiger-themed cartoon planes that gather speed as they whip around the curves of a small loop track.

Goin' Buggy.description: Ride on the back of a cute ladybug in Kiddieland. Carriages bounce up and down gently as they spin in circles.

Hand Cars.description: Steer a miniature, self-propelled train cart. Kids crank the levers using hand power to glide along track rails.

Italian Trapeze.description: A classic chair swing ride designed for children. Spin gently in individual swing chairs as they tilt.

Jet Skyfighter.description: Pilot mini military jet planes in Kiddieland. Control your height and click the target guns.

Kiddie Boats.description: Captain a tiny motor boat. Ring the brass bell and steer the wooden wheel through a gentle circular pool channel.

Kiddie Bumper Cars.description: A smaller, gentler version of Knoebels' bumper cars. Junior drivers steer and bump safely in miniature cars.

Kiddie Firetrucks.description: Ride antique fire engine carriages in a circle track. Kids ring a traditional bell at the front of cars.

Kiddie Himalaya.description: Spin forward in small cartoon cars over a wavy track. A junior-sized version of the classic fast-paced ride.

Kiddie Wheel.description: A miniature Ferris wheel standing 15 feet tall in Kiddieland. Lifts young riders high enough for a scenic view.

Kiddie Whip.description: A junior-sized whip ride. Miniature cars travel around an oval track and whip rapidly around the corners.

Kozmo's Kurves.description: A fun and fast family roller coaster named after the park's mascot. Zoom through quick hills and high-banked turns.

Motor Boats.description: Pilot motor boats through a scenic creek channel winding beneath trees and bridges in a relaxing boat run.

Ole Smokey.description: Take a relaxing ride around Knoebels' campground on a miniature steam-style train excursion.

Panther Cars.description: Drive a classic gas-powered Panther sports car along a winding, wooded track path. Fun driving for all ages.

Paradrop.description: Steer your own paratrooper plane. Rise and swing outward as the central arm spins and tilts over Kiddieland.

Pete's Fleet.description: Float along a winding water canal on mini motor boats. A relaxing, traditional water run for toddlers.

Pioneer Train.description: Embark on a relaxing 1.5-mile train trip through dense forests, traveling under Twister's wooden coaster structure.

Pony Carts.description: Ride miniature pony-drawn carts. Spin in a circle in Kiddieland on cute animal carriages.

Ribbit.description: Bounce up and down on a frog hopper ride in Kiddieland. Experience minor rises and vertical drop bounces.

Roto Jets.description: A restored classic jet-fighter flat ride. Control your rocket's height using a joystick lever as you spin.

S&G Carousel.description: A beautiful historic Stein & Goldstein carousel featuring hand-carved horses, offering a gentle, looping ride.

Scenic Skyway.description: Enjoy a scenic, slow chairlift ride up Knoebels' mountain. Get panoramic views of the entire park valley.

Spanish Bambini.description: Drive a junior sports car through a shaded track. A relaxing track-guided driving run for younger kids.

Tumbling Timbers.description: Experience minor drops and splashes on this kiddie log flume. Plunge down a short slide into a water pool.

Umbrella Ride.description: Drive mini cars or motorcycles beneath a giant umbrella canopy. A relaxing, traditional circle ride for toddlers.

Whipper.description: A classic Mangels Whip ride. Carriages slide along a flat track, pulling riders around the corners at fast angles.

1909 Illions Grand Carousel.description: Take a spin on a historic, beautifully hand-carved wooden carousel built by Marcus Illions in 1909, located in the Carousel Plaza.

Blizzard River.description: Embark on a wild white-water river rafting expedition through churning rapids, canyons, and water geysers in the North End.

Quantum Accelerator.description: A family steel coaster that sends riders racing along a twisted layout with rapid curves, themed to a high-tech laboratory experiment.

Stampede Bumper Cars Remix.description: Hop behind the wheel and bump your way through traffic on this classic, newly remixed bumper car arena in the Crackaxle Canyon.

Animation Department.description: A kid-friendly spinning flat ride featuring Warner Bros. cartoon characters where children can control their vehicle's rotation.

Daffy Duck Hollywood Tours.description: A gentle school bus ride for kids that lifts riders into the air and rotates them in vertical circles in Looney Tunes Movie Town.

New England Express.description: Board a scenic, relaxing narrow-gauge train ride that takes families on a circular loop around the park's key areas.

Rock N Rodeo.description: Spin and slide side-to-side on this bull-riding themed children's flat ride that simulates a bucking rodeo experience.

Ships Ahoy!.description: Steer a miniature boat through gentle, winding water channels on this classic kids' boat ride in Kidzopolis.

Taz Prop Delivery Company.description: Climb aboard mini airplanes that fly in gentle circular loops, allowing children to play pilot with the Tazmanian Devil.

The Great Chase.description: A family-friendly steel junior coaster offering gentle dips, quick turns, and a great introductory thrill for kids.

Tweety's Clubhouse.description: A junior drop tower that bounces children up and down gently, themed to Tweety Bird's birdhouse.

Wacky Wagons.description: Children can drive their own miniature trucks and cars along a themed track in a safe, fun environment.

Whirlybirdz.description: A helicopter-themed children's aerial carousel ride where kids can pedal to lift their helicopter higher into the air.

Wile E. Coyote Speed Trap.description: Ride in custom police cars that spin and speed around a circular track in chase of Wile E. Coyote.

Zinger Swings.description: A classic chair-o-plane swing ride in Kidzopolis that gently spins riders in suspended swings around a central tower.

Zoom Jets.description: Control your own altitude in jet-shaped cars that rotate in a circle on this gentle Kidzopolis family attraction.

BATMAN THE DARK KNIGHT™.description: Brave a floorless steel coaster layout featuring a 12-story drop, five inversions, and high-speed maneuvers with dangling feet.

CYBORG™ Hyper Drive.description: Spin and tilt on three axes inside a dark, sensory-heavy chamber themed to Cyborg's battle against the cybernetic villain Grid.

Flashback.description: Experience Vekoma's classic boomerang shuttle coaster, blasting through a cobra roll and loop forward, then doing it all backward.

GOTHAM CITY GAUNTLET ESCAPE FROM ARKHAM.description: Dodge the traps on this wild mouse style steel coaster featuring hairpin switchbacks and sudden drops in Gotham City.

GOTHAM CITY™ Crime Wave.description: Soar high and tilt over the park on this giant wave swinger ride themed to the chaotic streets of Gotham City.

HARLEY QUINN™ Spinsanity.description: Swing back and forth on a giant pendulum reaching 147 feet high at 70 mph while the circular ring of seats spins.

Houdini - The Great Escape.description: Enter Harry Houdini's historic manor for a madhouse dark ride illusion where the room appears to rotate completely upside-down.

New England SkyScreamer.description: Spin in open-air double swings at 40 mph dangling a breathtaking 400 feet above the park's North End.

SUPERGIRL™ Sky Flyer.description: Spin on a giant wheel that rotates and tilts, raising riders up to 67 feet in the air with their feet dangling.

SUPERMAN™ The Ride.description: Plunge down a 221-foot drop at 77 mph, passing through mist-filled tunnels on this world-renowned steel hypercoaster.

THE JOKER™ 4D Free Fly Coaster.description: Climb a 120-foot vertical lift before tumbling head-over-heels unpredictably in wing seats along a 4D free-spin track.

THE RIDDLER™ Revenge.description: Fly through five dangling inversions at 50 mph on this Vekoma Suspended Looping Coaster themed to the Riddler.

Thunderbolt.description: Six Flags New England's oldest operating roller coaster, a classic 1941 wooden figure-eight layout packed with historical charm.

Kiddie Pirate Ship.description: A fun-filled water play area in Hurricane Harbor designed for younger children, featuring a pirate ship climbing play area and mini slides.

Swiss Family Toboggan.description: Embark on a family-sized water raft slide that snakes down a winding, serpentine channel before splashing into a pool.

Monsoon Lagoon.description: Relax or wade in this massive, family-friendly wave pool featuring cascading waterfalls and gentle waves up to 5.5 feet deep.

Shark Attack.description: Choose between four different serpentine tube slides that offer high-speed curves in fully enclosed or partially open flumes.

Big Kahuna.description: Climb onto a multi-person raft and slide down an action-packed, winding water slide with sudden drops and steep curves.

Cannonball Falls.description: Plunge down high-speed body slides featuring steep drops and twists that conclude in a splashy runout pool.

Geronimo Falls and Zooma Falls.description: Multi-person family raft slides featuring fully enclosed tunnels and unexpected dips as you speed down a five-story course.

Hurricane Falls.description: A massive six-slide complex offering a variety of spinning spirals and twisting water slides from a high tower.

HH - Hurricane Falls (Hot).description: A warm-water variant of the Hurricane Falls slide complex, allowing comfortable splashy thrills during cooler weather.

HH - Lily Pads.description: Test your balance and agility by crossing floating lily pads across the pool using an overhead cargo net for support.

HH - Shipwreck Cay.description: An interactive shallow water play area for kids featuring sprayers, water dumps, and gentle mini slides.

Hurricane Bay.description: Ride high-energy ocean waves or float along in this massive wave pool located in the heart of Hurricane Harbor.

Wicked Cyclone.description: A thrilling RMC hybrid coaster featuring a 109-foot drop, speeds of 55 mph, and three inversions built over a wood structure.

\"Flower Magic\" Boat Tour.description: A relaxing, slow-moving boat ride that glides passengers through a scenic, floral-themed environment accompanied by waltz music.

\"HIGHLANDER\".description: A record-breaking gyro drop tower standing 394 feet tall, plunging riders at 75 mph with seats that tilt 30 degrees forward.

1903 Somerset Traffic.description: A children's driving school attraction where kids steer motorized vintage cars along a designated track to learn traffic rules.

Awilda’s Adventure Ride.description: A children's water log flume ride featuring two steep drops, periods of darkness, and sound effects themed to the pirate Awilda.

Awilda’s Lookout.description: A family-friendly freefall tower that lifts riders high in the air before dropping them in gentle, bouncing sequences.

Barcos del Mar.description: Spin in interactive motorcycle-themed boats where riders can control their individual boat's drift and lean.

Barracuda Slide.description: Slide down four twisting water bobsled lanes in rubber dinghies, experiencing steep drops from a height of 39 feet.

Beach Trucks at the Pirates Camp.description: A fun convoy-style truck ride for small children who drive themed beach vehicles through a pirates-themed camp track.

Carrousel Baltique.description: A beautifully themed Baltic maritime children's carousel featuring fixed sailing boats and sea creatures moving up and down.

Cog Ship Ride.description: Board a classic Mack cog ship spinner that sends families sailing up and down in circular wave-like patterns.

Crazy Mine.description: A thrilling Wild Mouse steel coaster that sends riders through sharp turns and steep drops inside mine-cart-styled vehicles.

Dr Livingstone’s Safari-Flight.description: A children's airplane ride where kids pilot their own explorer planes rotating around a central safari-themed column.

Einar's Fjord Cruise.description: Rock and spin on this Viking-themed Kontiki boat ride that moves along a track set amidst scenic fjord rocks and water.

Elin's Travels through the Sky.description: A junior drop tower that bounces children up and down gently, themed around Elin's fantasy journeys.

Escape of Novgorod.description: Launch from 0 to 62 mph in 1.4 seconds into pitch darkness before dropping 97 degrees on this intense hybrid dark/steel coaster.

HANSA Swing Ride.description: A beautiful wave swinger swing carousel themed around the Hanseatic League that lifts and tilts riders as they spin.

Indian River.description: Paddle along a gentle, scenic western canoeing canal themed to native American legends, designed exclusively for kids.

KÄRNAPULTEN.description: Take control of your own wings on this interactive Sky Fly ride, choosing to spin lazily or pull off intense 360-degree flips.

Luftikus.description: A classic, nostalgia-filled chain carousel that gently lifts and spins riders under a canopy of vintage art.

Midgard Serpent.description: Brave a themed family coaster based on Norse legends, featuring winding dips and curves along the water's edge.

Nessie.description: Survive the legendary Loch Ness Monster on Germany's first steel coaster to feature a vertical loop, hitting speeds of 53 mph.

New for 2026: Cornwall Coaster.description: Embark on Hansa Park's newest outdoor roller coaster adventure, navigating the winding rails themed to historic Cornwall.

Peterhof Tower.description: Use your own strength to pull your seat up this interactive family tower before gently bouncing down to the ground.

Pow Wow.description: Board a themed spinning flat ride in Bonanza-City where riders sit inside giant clay pots and control their own spin speed.

Royal Scotsman.description: Embark on a family-friendly Scottish train-themed roller coaster that speeds along a 522-meter track at 31 mph.

Safari Jeeps.description: Drive zebra-striped jeeps through a scenic jungle path to spot animatronic animals like lions, elephants, and crocodiles.

Space Scooter.description: Steer a bumper car through a retro space-themed arena, bumping into other spaceships in a fun cosmic setting.

Stormy Dragon Boat Ride.description: A children's log flume ride featuring dragon-themed boats and a thrilling 23-foot drop designed for little Vikings.

Störtebeker's Sea Raid.description: Embark on a spinning rubber raft water slide that slides down a steep 59-foot high ramp before splashing down.

Super Splash.description: A massive log flume ride featuring a steep 65-foot drop at an 85% gradient, guaranteeing a huge splash for riders.

Swing Boat.description: Board a giant swinging pirate ship that climbs high into the air, reaching heights up to 78 feet above the ground.

The little Tsar.description: A miniature kiddie steel roller coaster designed as a perfect first coaster for children, themed around classic Russian folklore.

The Oath of KÄRNAN.description: A legendary hypercoaster featuring a 240-foot vertical drop, hitting 79 mph, and a world-unique reverse free fall inside a dark tower.

Viking Boat Trip.description: Climb into themed Viking longboats that spin and float, simulating sailing through stormy seas in the Land of the Vikings.

Wave Rider.description: A classic Troika spinner ride where gondolas spin on rotating arms that lift and drop riders in sweeping waves.

Wild Water Ride - The Great Pike.description: Hansa Park's classic 1-kilometer long log flume ride that sends riders through winding rapids and a major 49-foot plunge.

Abyssus.description: Launch twice on this Vekoma Shockwave steel coaster, reaching 62 mph and flying through four inversions in Aqualantis.

Anaconda.description: Embark on an interactive spillwater boat ride featuring massive boats that plunge down steep waterfalls, creating huge splash waves.

Apocalypto.description: Spin and flip in multiple directions on this extreme double-arm rotation flat ride that generates intense G-forces.

Atlantis.description: Hop into a circular raft and float along winding water channels with fast-moving currents in the Family Zone.

Aztec Swing.description: Swing high into the air on a massive rotating pendulum arm flat ride that delivers up to 4.5G of extreme forces.

Boomerang.description: A family-friendly Vekoma shuttle coaster that shoots riders forward through twists and turns before repeating the course backward.

Dragon Adv. Rc.description: Take a gentle, elevated sightseeing tour through the medieval Smoczy Gród zone inside dragon-shaped monorail cars.

Draken Rc.description: A fun-filled family roller coaster featuring gentle climbs, curves, and dips themed around cute cartoon dragons.

Ekipa Light Explorers.description: A Vekoma family shuttle coaster in Aqualantis that zips forward and backward along a scenic track at 37 mph.

Farma Krasnali.description: A slow-paced, gentle ride where little kids drive mini-tractors through a countryside populated by animal figures.

Frida Rc.description: A gentle junior coaster featuring fun dips, turns, and loops themed to historical times, perfect as a first coaster for kids.

Frutti Loop Rc.description: An introduction coaster for young children, offering gentle turns and climbs around a giant fruit sculpture.

Grotto Expedition.description: Relax on a peaceful family boat ride through the ancient ruins, caves, and waterfalls of the Aqualantis zone.

Honey Harbor.description: A sweet bee-themed family coaster offering smooth twists, turns, and sweeps at speeds up to 28 mph.

Hyperion Rc.description: Brave Europe's tallest and fastest mega coaster, plunging 270 feet down an 85-degree drop at a screaming 88 mph.

Jeep Safari.description: Steer electric jungle jeeps along a guided track to observe simulated wild African animals in Bajkolandia.

Jungle Adventure.description: Spin down rapid currents, waterfalls, and sudden whirlpools on this massive family white-water rafting adventure.

Latajace Hustawki.description: Take a spin on a classic wave swinger carousel that lifts, tilts, and rotates riders high above the park midway.

Magic Fly.description: An elevated, slow-moving scenic family track ride that offers beautiful panoramic views of Bajkolandia and the water park.

Main Train.description: Board a scenic, relaxing train ride that takes families on a circular loop around Energylandia's key zones.

Mars Rc.description: A space-themed family steel roller coaster offering gentle dips, sweeps, and turns inside rocket-styled cars.

Mayan Rc.description: Survive Vekoma's extreme suspended looping coaster, hitting speeds of 50 mph through five inversions with dangling feet.

Monster House.description: Navigate spooky chambers in this interactive family dark ride, using laser guns to target ghouls and ghosts.

Moya Formula Rc.description: Launch from 0 to 62 mph in just 2 seconds on this Vekoma space booster steel coaster themed to motorsport racing.

Moya Formuła Autodrom.description: Drive, spin, and bump into friends on this classic, family-friendly bumper car arena in the Family Zone.

Rmf Dragon Rc.description: A family suspended steel coaster that swoops riders through castle gates, tight curves, and dark tunnels at 47 mph.

Samoloty.description: A children's airplane carousel ride where kids can fly in colorful planes that spin gently in circles.

śmiejżelki Energus Rc.description: A fun-filled junior roller coaster featuring smooth curves and gentle drops, styled after sweet Śmiejżelki candies.

Space Booster.description: Spin on a massive 130-foot arm at speeds up to 62 mph, experiencing intense 4G forces and head-over-heels rotations.

Space Gun.description: Two counter-weighted gondolas spin and loop 360 degrees in opposite directions on this high-G extreme pendulum ride.

Speed Rc.description: Brave the world's tallest and fastest water coaster, plunging 164 feet at 63 mph before making a massive splash.

Splash Battle.description: Embark on an interactive water battle boat ride, using water cannons to soak other boats and onlookers along the channel.

Swiss Water Cups.description: Spin as fast or as slow as you like in this water-based teacup ride, perfect for a refreshing spin with the family.

Tidal Wave Twister.description: Spin and swing along a U-shaped track on a giant disc ride that simulates weightlessness in the Aqualantis zone.

Toffifee Kopalnia Zlota.description: A mining-themed log flume water ride where boats climb 40 feet before plunging into a splash pool in the Family Zone.

Tsunami Drop.description: A 130-foot tall freefall drop tower in the Extreme Zone that lifts and drops riders in bouncing sequences.

Viking Rc.description: A spinning steel roller coaster where four-person cars rotate freely around their own axis as they slide along a wild mouse track.

Viking Ride.description: Relax on a peaceful Viking raft cruise that sails through a historically themed Viking Village in the Family Zone.

Wonder Wheel.description: A massive Ferris wheel located in the Dragon Zone, offering spectacular panoramic views of the entire park.

Wrc Auto Zderzaki.description: Hop behind the wheel of a bumper car and bump into other drivers on a classic indoor arena in Bajkolandia.

Zadra Rc.description: Energylandia's legendary RMC hybrid coaster, plunging 206 feet down a 90-degree drop and hitting 75 mph through 3 inversions.

Cat-O-Pillar Coaster.description: Swoop and turn through the gardens of Critter Creek on this fun family roller coaster featuring a giant caterpillar train.

Professor Blast's Expedition Express.description: Hop aboard Professor Blast's mini train for a gentle, scenic journey past wacky experiments and curious bugs.

Digger Ride.description: Young builders can drive their own yellow construction diggers around a themed building site track.

Ghostly Manor.description: Board rotating carriages and use your Phantom Phaser to capture cheeky ghouls in this interactive dark ride inside Dr. Kinley's manor.

Rio Grande Train Ride.description: Take a relaxing tour of the park on a classic miniature train featuring custom soundscapes.

Seal Falls.description: Young children sit in cute seal-themed boats that float through an igloo tunnel and plunge down a mini waterfall.

Teacup Ride.description: Spin as fast or as slow as you like in giant, brightly decorated cups on this classic family amusement ride.

The Sky Swinger.description: Soar high into the air on suspended swings that spin and tilt, offering beautiful views of the park.

The Victorian Carousel.description: A magnificent double-decker carousel featuring hand-painted panels, ornate carriages, and traditional wooden horses.

Viking Boats.description: Sail in dragon-headed longboats that gently float and rotate along a themed water channel.

Boulder Dash.description: Ride inside giant boulders or dinosaur eggs on this spinning flat ride located in the Lost Kingdom.

Dino Chase.description: A fun-filled junior roller coaster that speeds along a prehistoric track, perfect as a first coaster for young adventurers.

Flight of the Pterosaur.description: Swoop and glide high above the prehistoric landscape with dangling feet on this thrilling suspended family coaster.

Splash Lagoon.description: Sail in mini log flumes through prehistoric water channels, culminating in a splashy drop down a waterfall.

The Dinosaur Tour Co..description: Board 4x4 expedition jeeps for a guided safari to spot lifelike animatronic dinosaurs hidden in the jungle.

Velociraptor.description: Fly forward and backward along tight curves at 40 mph on this thrilling family shuttle coaster in the Lost Kingdom.

Daddy Pig's Car Ride.description: Kids can steer colorful electric cars around a custom track in the heart of Peppa Pig World.

George's Dinosaur Adventure.description: Hop on the back of a friendly green dinosaur that rocks back and forth along an outdoor track in Peppa Pig World.

Grampy Rabbit’s Sailing Club.description: Cruise in spinning boats past Grampy Rabbit's lighthouse and other iconic scenes in Peppa Pig World.

Grandpa Pig's Boat Trip.description: Take a circular sea voyage in Grandpa Pig's boats, rotating gently around a central lighthouse.

Grandpa Pig's Little Train.description: Ride in Grandpa Pig's colorful little train for a cheerful journey around the library area of Peppa Pig World.

Miss Rabbit's Helicopter Flight.description: Fly in brightly colored helicopters that rotate vertically on a Ferris wheel, offering views of Peppa Pig World.

Peppa's Big Balloon Ride.description: Climb into colorful balloon baskets that rise and spin gently above the clouds in Peppa Pig World.

The Queen’s Flying Coach Ride.description: Take an elevated monorail tour of Peppa Pig World inside royal coaches starting from the Queen's Castle.

Windy Castle.description: Fly high up into the clouds in rotating carriages that guests can spin manually at the top of the tower.

EDGE.description: Spin and swoop along a U-shaped track reaching speeds up to 43 mph, providing a sensation of weightlessness.

Pirate Ship.description: Swing back and forth up to a 60-degree angle on this classic, family-friendly swinging pirate ship.

Al's Auto Academy.description: Drive 1950s-style open-top cars on a guided driving track around Tornado Springs to earn your junior driving license.

Buffalo Falls.description: Climb up the towers and plunge down three steep, winding lanes in rubber dinghies on this splashy family water slide.

Cyclonator.description: Spin and swing up to a height of 82 feet at high speeds on a massive rotating pendulum arm gyro swing in Tornado Springs.

Farmyard Flyer.description: A family junior coaster themed around a 1950s crop-duster plane, featuring gentle banking turns and sweeping curves.

Trekking Tractors.description: Take a gentle tractor ride through Farmer Flo's farm, spotting groundhogs and farmyard animals along a scenic track.

Windmill Towers.description: A pair of twin windmill-themed junior drop towers that lift and bounce riders up and down in Tornado Springs.

Drakon.description: Brave Paultons Park's first-ever looping coaster in Valgard, featuring a vertical lift and beyond-vertical drop into two inversions.

Raven.description: Race along a twisting, bobsled-style steel coaster track featuring sudden drops, turns, and helixes in Valgard.

Vild Swing.description: Swing back and forth up to 39 feet high on a free-swinging pendulum gondola simulating a storm-at-sea sensation.

A TODA MÁQUINA.description: Board a spinning boat at Cartoon Village. Climb and drop through turbulent waves alongside Gallo Claudio in this fun family attraction.

Academia de pilotos Baby Looney Tunes.description: Fly over Cartoon Village in colorful cartoon-style airplanes. Enjoy beautiful views of the park on this gentle monorail ride.

CARTOON CAROUSEL.description: A beautiful classic carousel featuring Looney Tunes characters. Spin gently on your favorite cartoon animal at Cartoon Village.

Convoy de Camiones.description: Drive a big truck along a winding track in a peaceful convoy. A delightful truck-themed trail ride for the whole family.

Correcaminos Bip Bip.description: Race alongside the Road Runner on this thrilling family coaster. Swoop through the desert canyons of Cartoon Village at high speeds.

Emergencias Pato Lucas.description: Help Pato Lucas extinguish fires in Cartoon Village. Ride fire engines and use water cannons to hit the targets.

Escuela de Conducción Yabba-Dabba-Doo.description: Learn to drive in Fred Flintstone's stone-age town. Drive your own Yabba-Dabba-Doo car and earn a junior license.

He visto un lindo gatito.description: Fly upside down like a kite in Silvestre's quest to catch Piolín. Experience unique flying sensations face down.

La Aventura de SCOOBY-DOO.description: Help Scooby and the gang solve a mystery in a haunted mansion. Use your laser flashlight to shoot ghosts and score points.

LA CAPTURA DE GOSSAMER.description: Fly high on cartoon helicopters to catch the furry monster Gossamer. Control your vehicle's height in this family ride.

LOONEY TUNES CORREO AÉREO.description: Help deliver letters across Cartoon Village in Elmer's postal airplanes. A gentle and scenic flying ride for toddlers.

Marvin el Marciano Cohetes Espaciales.description: Blast off into space in Marvin the Martian's rocket ships. A delightful junior spinner ride located in Cartoon Village.

Pato Lucas Coches Locos.description: A junior bumper car ride inside Cartoon Village. Drive around and bump safely into friends in miniature duck-themed cars.

Piolín y Silvestre Paseo en Autobús.description: Board a magic cartoon bus that lifts and rotates you in the air. Enjoy a colorful overview of Cartoon Village.

Rápidos ACME.description: Navigate a splashing, turbulent river through the ACME factory. Prepare to get drenched by giant fountains and rapids.

Scooby-Doo's Tea Party Mistery.description: Spin around in colorful teacups alongside Scooby and Shaggy. Spin your cup as fast or slow as you want.

TOM & JERRY PICNIC EN EL PARQUE.description: Embark on a family-friendly coaster chase alongside Tom and Jerry. Hop on the giant juicebox train for a fun picnic run.

Wile E. Coyote Zona de Explosión.description: A junior drop tower designed for little daredevils. Experience gentle drops and bounces in Cartoon Village.

Batman Gotham City Escape.description: Launch into the ultimate chase on this elite multi-launch coaster. Experience 4 inversions, LSM launches, and a 98-degree drop.

La Venganza del ENIGMA.description: Ascend 100 meters high before plunging straight down at 80 km/h. Face extreme G-forces on one of the world's tallest drop towers.

LEX LUTHOR INVERTATRON.description: Lex Luthor's diabolical machine spins, rocks, and flips you upside down in a disorienting, high-intensity challenge.

MR. FREEZE FÁBRICA DE HIELO.description: Swoop through the air in flying chairs under Mr. Freeze's icy command. A classic wave swinger ride in DC Super Heroes World.

SHADOWS OF ARKHAM.description: Escape the asylum on this intense inverted coaster. Swoop, loop, and roll with your feet dangling over DC Super Heroes World.

SUPERMAN LA ATRACCIÓN DE ACERO.description: Fly like the Man of Steel on this world-class floorless coaster. Brave 7 inversions and a 55-meter drop at speeds up to 100 km/h.

THE JOKER COCHES DE CHOQUE.description: Crash and slide in the Joker's crazy bumper cars. Drive through a fun, chaotic arena in DC Super Heroes World.

Ladybugs.description: Ride on ladybug-themed carriages. A gentle spinning ride designed especially for younger children.

Magnificent Wave Carousel.description: Spin high in the air on a beautiful classic wave swinger. Swing chairs tilt and rotate in a wide loop.

Mighty Galleon.description: A family-sized pirate ship attraction that swings back and forth in gentle arcs over the midway.

Racing Regatta.description: Race forward in circular tracks on mini motor boats that tilt and undulate over simulated ocean waves.

Royal Tea Party.description: Spin in colorful teacups. Control your teacup's rotational speed using a wheel at the center of your carriage.

Wings of Wonder.description: Fly like a butterfly on this gentle kiddie swing ride. Rotate in low-altitude circles in a peaceful loop.

Frisco Steam Train.description: A scenic 20-minute journey aboard an authentic coal-fired steam locomotive, featuring a lighthearted train robbery show.

The Flooded Mine.description: Board a classic dark boat ride through a flooded penitentiary. Use interactive laser guns to shoot targets and free miners.

Thunderation.description: A high-speed Arrow mine train coaster rushing down hills and sweeping curves through dense woods at 48 mph.

Time Traveler.description: The world's fastest, steepest, and tallest spinning coaster, featuring 3 inversions, two LSM launches, and a vertical drop.

Outlaw Run.description: An elite wooden coaster boasting a 162-foot drop, a 81-degree drop angle, and three inversions at speeds up to 68 mph.

The Giant Barn Swing.description: A giant screaming swing flat ride. Swing up to 7 stories high at a 230-degree angle, experiencing weightlessness.

Area 51 - Top Secret.description: Board a classic Intamin splash boat ride to explore the mysteries of Groom Lake. Face sudden drops, turns, and geysers.

Avatar Air Glider.description: Swoop face-down through the air on this Zamperla Kite Flyer. Glide in circles to simulate flying like an airbender.

Backyardigans Mission to Mars.description: A family-friendly junior steel coaster. Ride along a custom space track with quick curves and small dips.

Crazy Surfer.description: Spin back and forth on a giant pendulum track while sitting on a rotating surfboard disk. Face outward for maximum thrill.

Dora’s Big River Adventure.description: Plunge down a steep log flume drop inside Nickland. Ride log-shaped boats along a colorful, splashing channel.

Excalibur - Secrets of the Dark Forest.description: Navigate a churning white-water river rapids ride through the mystical dark forest. Prepare to get drenched by geysers.

Fairy World Spin.description: Spin in colorful teacups. Control your teacup's rotational speed using a wheel at the center of your carriage.

Ghost Chasers.description: Survive the tight hairpin turns and sudden drops of this Vekoma wild mouse coaster themed after the Nickelodeon ghost.

Iron Claw.description: Swoop over trackless steel loops and drops on this suspended looping coaster (SLC), featuring 5 disorienting inversions.

Jimmy Neutron Atomic Flyer.description: Fly over track structures with dangling feet on this suspended family coaster. Smooth turns and dips for families.

Movie Park Studio Tour.description: An immersive multi-dimension coaster taking riders through active film stages, featuring launches and 360 rotation.

NYC Transformer.description: Lex Luthor's diabolical machine spins, rocks, and flips you upside down in a disorienting, high-intensity challenge.

PAW Patrol Adventure Tour.description: Drive a PAW Patrol emergency vehicle along a track-guided junior driving course. A fun adventure for kids.

Pier Side Carousel.description: A beautiful classic wave swinger ride. Spin gently through the breeze as chairs tilt and rotate.

Rescue 112.description: Use water cannons on fire engines to hit targets and put out fires. An interactive family driving ride.

Santa Monica Wheel.description: A classic Ferris wheel offering beautiful panoramic views of the park and the surrounding Ruhr area.

Sea Swing.description: A child-sized chair swing spinner ride. Rotate gently in individual seats over the Santa Monica Pier.

Side-Kick.description: Swoop high on a giant pendulum swing. Spin in circles as the giant arm oscillates back and forth.

Skye's High Flyer.description: Board a spinning, tilting PAW Patrol themed carriage that lifts you gently in overlapping circles.

Splat-O-Sphere.description: Fly high on this tall tower swing ride. Control your own wings to tilt and glide through the air.

SpongeBob Splash Bash.description: Engage in an interactive water battle. Use water cannons on your boat to drench targets and other riders.

Star Trek™: Operation Enterprise.description: An elite launched coaster featuring a triple-launch system, a vertical spike, and three inversions.

Stormy Cruise.description: Spin and rock back and forth on a giant pendulum track. Sit facing outward on a cartoon boat disk.

The Bandit.description: Germany's first wooden coaster. Speeds reach 50 mph on a massive wooden structure over the desert of Old West.

The ​High Fall.description: Ascend 60 meters on a tilting drop tower. Face extreme vertical freefalls at high speeds.

Time Riders.description: Embark on a time travel simulator journey through history, featuring motion seats and 3D screens.

Zuma's Zoomers.description: Miniature cars travel around an oval track and whip rapidly around the corners on this junior whip ride.

Ahoj-Brause Horror Lab.description: A terrifying walkthrough horror maze. Face live scare actors and sensory special effects inside the lab.

Back at the Barnyard Bumpers.description: Steer and bump safely in cute cartoon bumper cars. A classic junior bumper car arena.

Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: License to.description: Learn to drive on a junior driving course themed after the Ninja Turtles. Earn your own driving license.

The Lost Temple.description: Embark on an immersive tunnel dark ride adventure. Explore a hidden underground temple with 3D screens.

Adventure Falls.description: Plunge down a steep water slide in a large boat, creating a massive tidal wave splash that completely drenches riders and onlookers.

Airplanes.description: Fly high in cartoon airplanes in the park's kiddie area. A gentle and scenic flying ride designed for toddlers.

Beagle Scout Lookout.description: Fly over Camp Snoopy in colorful hot-air balloons. Control your vehicle's height in this gentle spinner ride.

Cyclone Zone.description: Three enclosed water slides that twist and turn through dark pipelines before splashing out into a shallow pool.

Drummer Boy.description: Spin in colorful teacups. Control your teacup's rotational speed using a wheel at the center of your carriage.

Elephants.description: Fly high on cartoon elephant carriages. Control your vehicle's altitude as you spin in a gentle loop in Kiddieland.

Flying Trapeze.description: Spin high in the air on a beautiful classic wave swinger. Swing chairs tilt and rotate in a wide loop.

Funnel of Fear.description: Brave a massive water funnel slide on a multi-person raft. Twist through enclosed tubes before dropping into a giant funnel.

Giant Gondola Wheel.description: A classic Ferris wheel standing at 90 feet tall. Enjoy a relaxing, rotating flight with views of the entire park.

Grand Rapids.description: Navigate a churning white-water river on an Intamin circular raft. Face geysers, rapids, and waterfalls.

HydroBlaster.description: Race down two fully enclosed pipeline water slides on double inner tubes, experiencing steep drops and quick turns.

Kiddie Cars.description: Drive miniature fire trucks and police cars. A relaxing, traditional circle track driving ride for toddlers.

Lakeside Gliders.description: Pilot your own flying tub, using the front rudder sail to catch the wind and swing wildly outward as the ride rotates.

Mad Mouse.description: Survive the tight hairpin turns and sudden drops of this classic Arrow wild mouse coaster. Features single-car passenger styling.

Mammoth River.description: Plunge down a massive, open-air family raft slide. Winding turns and splashes on a multi-passenger inner tube.

Mine Shaft.description: Step into the launch capsule and feel the trap door open, plunging you into a steep, high-speed freefall water slide.

Paradise Plunge & Tropical Twist.description: Two open-air water slides that twist and slide through looping curves before splashing into a pool.

Pigpen’s Mud Buggies.description: Drive a junior tractor buggy through a shaded track. Carriages spin and bounce gently as they rotate.

Ridge Rider & Wild Slide.description: Two fast-paced water slides featuring steep drops and sudden splashes, perfect for thrill seekers.

Shivering Timbers.description: An elite wooden coaster featuring a 122-foot drop, a massive layout of airtime hills, and speeds up to 57 mph.

Slidewinders.description: Three looping water slides that twist and slide through open-air curves before splashing into a pool.

Snake Pit.description: A collection of enclosed water slides featuring tight turns, drop drops, and high-speed splashing runs.

Speed Splashers.description: A kid-sized water slide area inside the splash lagoon, designed for safe splashing and junior sliding.

Swan Boats.description: Pedal a giant swan-shaped boat around a scenic, peaceful park lake. A relaxing experience for families.

Thunderbolt.description: A classic Matterhorn flat ride that spins passengers forward and backward in a high-speed undulating loop.

Timbertown Railway.description: Take a relaxing, scenic scale train ride around the park. Travel past Camp Snoopy and the park's wooded landscape.

Trabant.description: Spin and tilt on a giant rotating wheel that raises you at steep angles on this classic flat ride.

Winky the Whale.description: Ride in whale-shaped carriages. A gentle spinning ride designed especially for younger children.

Wolverine Wildcat.description: A classic wooden coaster designed by Curtis D. Summers, featuring sudden drops, high Gs, and lateral curves.

Zach’s Zoomer.description: A family-friendly wooden coaster named after the former owner's grandson. Speed through hills and banked curves.

The TEMPLE.description: Board a tracking car for an interactive Egyptian dark ride. Use laser guns to shoot targets, activate animations, and score points.

X-treme Racers.description: A thrilling Wild Mouse coaster reaching speeds of 35 mph on a looping, winding track with sudden drops and tight hairpin turns.

NINJAGO The Ride.description: A high-tech 4D dark ride where you control fireballs, lightning, and ice waves using hand gestures to defeat the Great Devourer.

Flying Eagle.description: Tear through the air on this Zierer family coaster, plunging down from Eagle Rock and sweeping past animated LEGO animals.

LEGO® Canoe.description: Paddle through a wild water rapids canal inside LEGOREDO Town, encountering LEGO forest animals before a final splash drop.

Arctic Icebreakers.description: Navigate a customized, interactive LEGO boat channel. Captain your miniature vessel through icebergs and waterways.

Polar X-plorer.description: A steel family coaster featuring a unique 5-meter vertical freefall drop drop element and views of real penguins.

Apocalypseburg Sky Battle.description: Control your own flight on this interactive plane ride. Roll and spin upside-down as you soar up to 14 meters high.

Emmet’s Flying Adventure - Masters of Fl.description: Fly through the LEGO Movie universe on Scandinavia's first flying theater, featuring a giant 180-degree dome screen.

Daddy Pig's Roller Coaster.description: Ride in Daddy Pig's red car on this kid-friendly steel coaster. Travel along gentle curves and small hills.

Grampy Rabbit's Dinosaur Adventure.description: Ride a friendly green dinosaur along a winding track, passing cartoon characters and primeval trees.

Grandad Dog’s Pirate Boat Ride.description: Set sail on a pirate-themed boat ride. Spin and float gently through a looping water channel.

Mr. Bull's High Striker.description: A junior-sized drop tower designed for little daredevils. Experience gentle drops and rises.

Peppa Pig’s Balloon Ride.description: Rise high in colorful hot-air balloons. A colorful family balloon spinner offering great views of the park.
